name: Response Agent Evaluations — 10 HITL Response Scenarios

parts.text:
Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-004:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-001
**Approval Status:** APPROVED

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "MALICIOUS", "priority": "CRITICAL", "confidence_score": 0.97, "recommended_action": "CONTAIN"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[{"proposed_action": "Isolate Endpoint", "action_provider": "CrowdStrike", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "finance-server-03", "entity_type": "HOSTNAME"}], "justification": "Active ransomware — LockBit 3.0 encrypting files"}]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
None

If approval_status is APPROVED: Execute the approved actions using execute_manual_action.
Response action executed for CASE-EVAL-004. Endpoint finance-server-03 isolated via CrowdStrike EDR. Approval HITL-001 fulfilled. Case documented.

Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-010:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-002
**Approval Status:** PENDING

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "MALICIOUS", "priority": "HIGH", "confidence_score": 0.90, "recommended_action": "CONTAIN"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[{"proposed_action": "Block IP", "action_provider": "PaloAlto", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "185.220.101.42", "entity_type": "ADDRESS"}], "justification": "C2 beaconing confirmed — periodic connections every 60 seconds"}]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
None

If approval_status is PENDING: Submit proposed actions to HITL and return current status.
Response proposal submitted for CASE-EVAL-010. Awaiting analyst approval for IP block of 185.220.101.42 via PaloAlto firewall. No actions executed — PENDING.

args.comment: Response proposal submitted — pending HITL approval

parts.text:
Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-011:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-003
**Approval Status:** REJECTED

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "SUSPICIOUS", "priority": "HIGH", "confidence_score": 0.82, "recommended_action": "ESCALATE_T2"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[{"proposed_action": "Disable User", "action_provider": "Okta", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "cfo@company.com", "entity_type": "USER"}], "justification": "Impossible travel — potential account compromise"}]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
CFO confirmed travel to Lagos via corporate travel system. VPN was used. False alarm. Continue monitoring only.

If approval_status is REJECTED: Document rejection in case and close response workflow.
Response action REJECTED for CASE-EVAL-011. Analyst confirmed CFO travel is legitimate via corporate travel system. No actions executed. Case documented — continue monitoring.

args.comment: Response REJECTED — CFO travel confirmed legitimate

parts.text:
Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-005:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-004
**Approval Status:** MODIFIED

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "MALICIOUS", "priority": "HIGH", "confidence_score": 0.88, "recommended_action": "CONTAIN"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[{"proposed_action": "Block IP", "action_provider": "PaloAlto", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "198.51.100.25", "entity_type": "ADDRESS"}], "justification": "Brute force source — 527 failed logins"}]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
Approved with modification: Block the IP but make it temporary (24h block, not permanent). Also block the /24 subnet 198.51.100.0/24 as all IPs in that range are from the same bulletproof hosting provider.

If approval_status is MODIFIED: Execute with analyst's modified parameters.
Response actions executed for CASE-EVAL-005 with MODIFIED parameters. Temporary 24h block applied to 198.51.100.0/24 subnet via PaloAlto firewall per analyst instructions. Case documented.

args.comment: Response executed (MODIFIED) — 24h subnet block per analyst

parts.text:
Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-009:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-005
**Approval Status:** EXPIRED

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "MALICIOUS", "priority": "MEDIUM", "confidence_score": 0.93, "recommended_action": "CONTAIN"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[{"proposed_action": "Kill Process", "action_provider": "CrowdStrike", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "web-server-prod-02", "entity_type": "HOSTNAME"}], "justification": "Cryptomining process xmrig.exe"}]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
None

Approval HITL-005 expired after 30 minutes without analyst decision.

If approval_status is EXPIRED: Document expiry, re-submit if still needed.
Approval HITL-005 expired for CASE-EVAL-009. No actions executed. Documented expiry in case. Cryptomining still active — re-submission recommended with escalation to on-call analyst.

args.comment: HITL approval EXPIRED — no actions taken, re-submission needed

Response action executed for CASE-EVAL-001. Domain login-secure.example.com blocked at PaloAlto DNS/proxy level. Approval HITL-006 fulfilled.

Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-012:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-007
**Approval Status:** APPROVED

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "SUSPICIOUS", "priority": "HIGH", "confidence_score": 0.85, "recommended_action": "ESCALATE_T2"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[
  {"proposed_action": "Disable User", "action_provider": "Okta", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "intern.jones@company.com", "entity_type": "USER"}], "justification": "Unauthorized Domain Admin addition"},
  {"proposed_action": "Revoke Sessions", "action_provider": "Okta", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "intern.jones@company.com", "entity_type": "USER"}], "justification": "Terminate all active sessions after privilege escalation"}
]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
None

If approval_status is APPROVED: Execute both approved actions.
Both response actions executed for CASE-EVAL-012. User intern.jones@company.com disabled and all sessions revoked via Okta. Approval HITL-007 fulfilled.

args.comment: Response executed — user disabled + sessions revoked

parts.text:
Execute response actions for Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-001:

**Client ID:** eval-client
**Approval ID:** HITL-010
**Approval Status:** APPROVED

**Triage Findings:**
{"verdict": "MALICIOUS", "priority": "HIGH", "confidence_score": 0.92, "recommended_action": "CONTAIN"}

**Proposed Actions:**
[{"proposed_action": "Force Password Reset", "action_provider": "Okta", "target_entities": [{"identifier": "john.doe@company.com", "entity_type": "USER"}], "justification": "Credentials submitted to phishing page — must be rotated immediately"}]

**Analyst Instructions (if MODIFIED):**
None

If approval_status is APPROVED: Execute the approved action.
Response action executed for CASE-EVAL-001. Password reset forced for john.doe@company.com via Okta. User will be prompted to create new password on next login.
